summary: PDF & Resend Integration Pack testing completed - 9/9 backend tests passed (100%). PDF export works correctly for quotes and invoices. Notification system gracefully handles missing RESEND_API_KEY. All notification triggers wired into routes.

notification_status_endpoint.notes: Returns resend_configured=false, api_key_preview=null when no RESEND_API_KEY

quote_pdf_export.notes: Returns valid PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf. PDF signature verified.

invoice_pdf_export.notes: Returns valid PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf. PDF signature verified.

quote_creation_with_notification.notes: Quote creation succeeds. notify_quote_ready() called but fails gracefully without API key. Quote persisted correctly.

campaign_performance_summary.notes: Returns campaigns list and totals (clicks, redemptions, revenue, discounts, commissions, conversion_rate)

service_request_status_update.notes: Status update succeeds. notify_service_update() called but fails gracefully without API key.

notification_send_test.notes: Returns ok:false with error message about missing RESEND_API_KEY

critical_code_review_comments: notification_events.py: Clean implementation with safe_send_email wrapper that catches ResendEmailError
resend_live_service.py: Properly raises ResendEmailError if RESEND_API_KEY not configured
document_pdf_routes.py: Premium PDF generator with reportlab integration works correctly
All notification triggers are non-blocking - route operations succeed even when notification fails
seed_data_creation: Test quotes created with TEST_ prefix for notification verification

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - returns ok:false with error message but does not crash routes

context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF & Resend Integration Pack fully tested. PDF export for quotes (/api/documents/pdf/quote/{id}) and invoices (/api/documents/pdf/invoice/{id}) working with premium templates. Resend integration is MOCKED (no RESEND_API_KEY) but gracefully fails. All notification triggers (notify_quote_ready, notify_invoice_ready, notify_service_update, notify_payment_received) are wired into routes and handle errors gracefully.
